message:
fix(config): validate protected_paths glob patterns at config load time (bd-xn8)

Invalid glob patterns in scanner.protected_paths were only caught when
ProtectionRegistry::new() ran at daemon start. Move validation into
Config::validate() so errors are caught by `sbh config validate` and
other early checks. Expose validate_glob_pattern() from protection
module for config-time use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
